overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rain-soaked, foggy dystopian urban street at night. The environment features burning barrels, overhead power lines, neon-lit buildings, and scattered pedestrians in a cyberpunk slum setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with overhead power lines and burning refuse

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley following a distant figure ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of ego through the alleyway

entered.detail: tall concrete apartment building with small windows and weathered facade
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing between poles above the street
metal barrel with open flames providing orange light and smoke
wooden electrical pole with transformers and multiple wire connections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow rain-soaked alley flanked by a concrete residential building on the left. Overhead power lines crisscross the sky as the camera moves forward past a burning trash barrel on the right. A lone figure walks ahead in the distance, guiding the path through the foggy, dimly lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with burning vehicles and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: exits narrow alley into wider street with visible overpass and burning vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the open street passing burning vehicles and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: burning car wreck emitting flames and smoke on the roadside
walking ahead through the open street area

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
elevated highway or bridge structure spanning across the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wider street with a graffiti-covered wall on the right and a concrete overpass visible in the distance. The camera passes a burning car wreck on the roadside as the rain continues to fall. The residential building recedes into the background while industrial structures become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial slope with large warehouse structures

events.description: transitions from paved street to dirt slope alongside industrial warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up a dirt slope alongside industrial warehouses, moving away from the main street

notable_agents.action: descending the dirt slope toward the camera

entered.detail: large corrugated metal building with few windows and industrial lighting
sloped dirt path with scattered debris and patches of weeds

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a dirt embankment alongside a massive industrial warehouse on the left. The camera ascends the slope as the overpass moves to the left side of the frame. A pedestrian descends toward the camera from the warehouse area while the rain-slicked dirt path reflects the ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and storefronts

events.description: enters commercial district with prominent neon lighting and illuminated storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing parked vehicles and neon-lit shops

notable_agents.action: parked car with illuminated brake lights on the street side

entered.detail: building facade with large windows and illuminated entrance
bright colored neon lights advertising businesses
large illuminated sign visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a commercial district with vibrant neon signage illuminating the storefronts on the right. The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk past parked cars with glowing brake lights. The foggy atmosphere diffuses the neon colors while pedestrians gather near shop entrances, creating a dense urban nightlife scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked dystopian slum that gradually transforms from a claustrophobic alley into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins in a narrow, foggy corridor flanked by a concrete residential building, moving past a burning trash barrel while following a lone figure in the distance. As the path opens into a wider street, the camera passes a graffiti-covered wall and a burning car wreck before the residential architecture recedes to reveal industrial structures and a distant overpass. The scene then shifts toward a dirt embankment alongside a massive warehouse, where the camera ascends a rain-slicked slope as a pedestrian descends from the industrial area. Finally, the environment transitions into a dense urban nightlife scene, moving along a concrete sidewalk past parked cars and glowing brake lights toward storefronts illuminated by vibrant, diffused neon signage.
